signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below 2.3-2.4% Consensus | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but tempered by government fuel caps and food vouchers, missing market forecasts of 2.3-2.4%.[1][2][3] Monthly CPI gained 0.3%, under the 0.6% expected, with core inflation (ex-food/energy)
